channel.title: My Local Area Daily
channel.description: A daily AI-generated summary of local news.
channel.itunes:author: Local Podcast Bot

item.title: My Local Area Daily — 2026-04-08
item.description:
Good morning and welcome to My Local Area Daily, it's Wednesday the eighth of April 2026, and I'm glad you've joined me.
Let's start with some big news from local council. A councillor resignation is set to trigger a by-election, so we'll be keeping an eye on that as it develops. Meanwhile, the draft council budget has been revealed, giving residents a first look at what's planned for the year ahead. And our Mayor Sue Baker has been appointed to the state government's Local Government Mayor Adv
item.itunes:title: My Local Area Daily — 2026-04-08
